title: Persona overhaul
description: This resource pack replaces 4 music disk with music from Persona 3 and 5
body:
This Pack Replace these 4 music disks
Wait - Brand New Days (Persona 3 FES)
Mall -  Color your night (Persona 3 Reload)
Chirp - Colors flying high (Persona 5 Royal)
Blocks - No more what ifs (Persona 5 Royal)
